Belief geometry: PCA vs single-step ortho-Fisher (dims 1–9)

Top row = PCA (variance-ordered: what the model represents). Bottom row = ortho-Fisher (P=UUᵀ onto the single-step Fisher subspace: what moves the next token; rank-limited, so dims past the rank are near-flat noise). Columns = dims 1-3 / 4-6 / 7-9. Color = posterior weight (dark = uncertain/apex, bright = confident/tip). Drag any panel to rotate.

MODEL
PCA — dims 1-3 · 4-6 · 7-9
ortho-Fisher — dims 1-3 · 4-6 · 7-9
